description: STING HVAC life-cycle cost defaults (Phase 192 E2). Two worked system options over a 40-year horizon; nominal + NPV. Corporate starter baseline; a project supplies its own scenario at <project>/_BIM_COORD/hvac_lcc.json (overlay replaces this wholesale). Per-option annualEnergyCost may be given directly, or derived as energyKwhPerYear × tariffPerKwh, or (deriveEnergyFromModel:true) as Σ HVC_PEAK_SENS_W × equivalentFullLoadHours ÷ 1000 × tariff. annualMaintCostPerM2 × areaM2 (areaM2 auto-filled from the model floor area when 0) gives annual maintenance; replacements recur every intervalYears at pctOfCapital of the capital cost.
